title: Worker Sync Request
description: Request sent by worker to scheduler during sync cycle. Session-based protocol.

sessionState.description: Present when worker owns a session. Heartbeat or event poll.

sessionResult.description: Present when reporting a just-finished agent turn with the agent's native session ID.

sessionId.description: Scheduler session ID the worker is managing.

status.description: Worker-reported session status. 'running' = heartbeat, 'waiting_for_event' = long-poll for next task.

agentSessionId.description: Agent's native session ID (informational, reserved for Phase 3 heartbeat enrichment).

sessionId.description: Scheduler session ID for the completed turn.

agentSessionId.description: Agent's native session ID for resume support.

examples.description: Worker reporting agent session ID after turn
